query: Automate your SEO, while you build your product. alternative

results.title: SEO Automation Software: 7 Top Tools (2025)
results.content:
Keeping your ecommerce website up-to-date is a crucial but time-consuming task. Beyond ensuring your product pages are current, managing data security, and staying on top of software updates, you also need to keep up with the ever-changing world of search engine optimization (SEO). Between algorithm updates and technical reviews, managing your SEO efforts takes effort and expertise.

Automated SEO software can lighten the load. These tools manage some of the more labor-intensive SEO tasks, such as running audits, fixing site errors, and optimizing product pages—helping your store stay discoverable as it grows. That way, you can spend less time on technical details and more time doing what matters most: building your brand, telling your story, and making sales. [...] In short, SEO automation handles the technical heavy lifting while you focus on what makes your business yours—your unique story, your customer relationships, and your creative vision.

## What types of SEO tasks can you automate?

 Monitoring and reporting
 Insights and recommendations
 Content production
 Website changes

You can automate most of the repetitive, data-heavy parts of SEO. Together, these automation layers keep your store optimized, visible, and running smoothly while freeing up time for growth and creative work.

Broadly, automation platforms help with the following:

### Monitoring and reporting [...] ### DIY automation: ChatGPT + Zapier

ChatGPT and Zapier can work together to automate basic SEO tasks. Zapier connects your apps and data sources, triggering ChatGPT to generate or update content automatically. It can help you by creating meta tags when a new blog post is published or by drafting product descriptions based on updated inventory data. This setup offers a flexible, low-cost way for small teams to experiment with AI-powered SEO automation, though it still requires setup and testing to fine-tune results.

Pricing: ChatGPT offers a free basic plan and paid business plans starting at $25 per user per month (billed annually); Zapier also has a free tier, with paid tiers starting at $19.99 per month (billed annually).

Work smarter with apps

results.title: 13 best SEO automation tools I'm using in 2026
results.content:
Here’s are the core elements of how Gumloop works:

With Gumloop, you can create these AI agents for different SEO workflows. For example, I have an AI agent that takes a blog post draft (like this blog post draft I'm working on right now for this article) and it will automatically proofread it and edit any grammar mistakes using ChatGPT, and that's all automated.

SEO automation in Gumloop

Gumloop is so powerful that I truly believe you can build a lot of different automations within your SEO workflows — where it makes many of the other tools sort of obsolete. It doesn't completely erase the need for every tool, but it does let you build whatever you want as long as you know what the steps are. [...] There’s a J.R.R. Tolkien quote that says, “shortcuts create long delays,” and I’m a huge believer in that. Using AI to generate content, and then going back as a human to edit that AI-generated content, fits perfectly into that quote. You’ll likely end up taking way longer to create something great from an SEO perspective than if you had just started with the human aspect.

As you’ve seen throughout this article, there are tons of different tools that can automate repetitive tasks in your SEO process. So now it’s up to you to figure out how you can slowly remove yourself from certain parts of your workflow, so you can focus more on the human side. [...] ### Which parts of SEO can be automated?

While I don't advocate for using AI to take over all of your SEO efforts, especially writing or SEO strategy, I do believe there are ways to leverage automation to speed up your content creation process.

Here are some examples of how I use automation tools in my SEO workflow:

AS you can see, there are a lot of ways you can use AI to automate SEO performance — from content strategy to competitor analysis.

## What to look for in an SEO automation tool

It’s getting easier and easier to build software. And because of this, there are tons of new AI tools being flooded in the market. Some of them are great, most of them suck. But that’s why you come to Marketer Milk to push through the noise and find the good stuff (that’s actually tested).

results.title: Navigate the SEO Automation Tools Landscape
results.content:
Here's what happens in Siteimprove:

A content team uploads a new product page. Within seconds, they see:

The platform automatically prioritizes fixes based on error impact. Is that broken product link causing both SEO and accessibility issues? It jumps to the top. The minor keyword opportunity that won't affect rankings? It can wait. [...] Enterprise teams need tools that protect both rankings and compliance. Siteimprove's unified approach meets that need. Everything lives in one system, with one SEO workflow and one source of truth.

And major brands are seeing the impact. Consider Cuisinart, which faced 45 major website issues across accessibility and site health when it started.

Within eight months of implementing Siteimprove's unified platform, it slashed those issues down to just nine. It simultaneously cut resolution time in half. Its team now spends less time firefighting and more time driving digital innovation, all while maintaining compliance standards that exceed industry benchmarks.

### Siteimprove case studies

Let’s see how Siteimprove helps a product launch workflow. Most teams need three separate tools: [...] The eye-opener? Most teams use 20% of features but spend 80% of their time just figuring out how to access them. Meanwhile, your dev team is building internal tools because "enterprise-ready" apparently means "ready to give your workflow team migraines."

Siteimprove takes a different path: One interface handles SEO, accessibility, and compliance. No feature treasure hunts. No support maze. Just unified workflows that match how enterprise teams actually work.

## The integration promise vs. the 3 a.m. API crisis

Every SEO platform promises seamless integration. Connect anything! Sync everything!

results.title: Unlocking the Power of SEO Automation and Optimization ...
results.content:
### Siteimprove.ai: The complete enterprise platform

Siteimprove.ai tackles the one problem other SEO tools ignore: fragmentation. While most tools have you bouncing between tabs and exporting CSV files, this SEO automation software turns tedious SEO tasks into smooth automated routines.

In fact, we refer to it a platform because, unlike single-point solutions, Siteimprove.ai unifies accessibility, analytics, content strategy and SEO.  Using a shared data layer with cross-product workflows, automation, and integration, it enables teams orchestrate outcomes across the entire digital performance lifecycle, not just run a single task. [...] Think your technical SEO is under control? Siteimprove's seen that movie before. Its crawlers regularly uncover sites that look perfect on the surface but are secretly held together with digital duct tape and a prayer. Meanwhile, MarketMuse keeps your content structure from turning into the SEO equivalent of a junk drawer.

Here's what proper automation looks like:

Your SEO team didn't master their craft to spend eight hours hunting down broken redirects. Let Siteimprove and MarketMuse handle the digital grunt work while your experts tackle the challenges that need human brainpower.

## Stop drowning in data, start swimming in insights [...] ## Stop reading, start automating

Your SEO stack needs an upgrade. You know it, your team knows it, and your competitors definitely know it. But before you start signing checks, let's talk about what actually works.

First, audit your current setup:

Next, pick your battles. Start with the stuff that hurts most:

When you're ready to make the switch, do the following:

Looking ahead? SEO automation isn't slowing down. More companies are ditching their disconnected tools for unified platforms that actually work together. The question isn't if you'll make the switch, it's whether you'll do it before or after your competition.

Ready to stop reading and start automating? Get a demo and see how the best SEO automation software can improve your SEO workflow.
